untranslatable_reason: Signal requires estimation of fundamental value and ownership cash flow visibility (dividends, earnings, asset liquidation value), which are not available as technical indicators in the allowed indicator set. The rule depends on external fundamental analysis inputs that cannot be computed from price/volume data alone. Approximated entry using price ratio (0.8 = 20% discount) and exit at parity (1.0), but this does not capture the true fundamental value thesis or cash flow validation requirements.
translation_notes: Entry approximated as close price 20% below a normalized baseline (0.8 as proxy for 20% discount). Exit approximated as return to 1.0 (price parity). Holding period set to 720 days (24 months minimum). Max drawdown tolerance of 25% mapped to stop_loss_pct. Core thesis around fundamental value estimation, ownership rights, and dividend/cash flow visibility cannot be operationalized with technical indicators alone and requires external fundamental data inputs.
